accessibility_conformance_claim.detail: This Public Beta release is approved as a product release based on automated, keyboard and owner review evidence. It does not claim WCAG 2.2 Level AA conformance because deployment-bound real-screen-reader session records are not required for this release profile.

reasons: production D1 Public Release pointer update
product-owner release approval without a WCAG conformance claim

reproducibility.detail: The deployed OpenNext artifact was built from the exact source tree of merge commit 2c5e5eb and the same unmodified artifact was promoted from Staging to Production.
evidence: Merge commit 2c5e5eb0bb923aac216acdad7b21b594811b933d has source tree c8e37ba9e74d2e8068fbb567cfc319304c172256
Local source tree before build matched c8e37ba9e74d2e8068fbb567cfc319304c172256
OpenNext artifact checksum sha256:574558de820538a150d732ed0e3e18d9374a17bc334daac1b3420a7763579e8b across 1396 files
Staging and Production were deployed without rebuilding between promotions
Release Gate Run 29682915629 passed Linux and Windows Default Gates

static_correctness.detail: The immutable system-closure source passed its clean-checkout gates and produced a successful production OpenNext build for the final release promotion.
evidence: Release Gate Run 29682915629 SUCCESS
Linux Default Gate job 88182153124 SUCCESS
Windows Default Gate job 88182153134 SUCCESS
OpenNext Cloudflare build completed successfully on 2026-07-19
Next.js production build completed with type and lint validation

media_and_content_truth.detail: The promoted release is the reviewed Golden Dataset projection with explicit source, media-license, uncertainty and publication-state handling.

browser_journeys.detail: The complete production browser journey suite passed against both the final Staging deployment and the promoted canonical Production deployment.
evidence: Staging browser smoke 75/75 PASS with 1 expected skip
Production browser smoke 75/75 PASS with 1 expected skip
One transient Production net::ERR_CONNECTION_CLOSED was followed by 70/70 Editorial Home repetitions and a clean 75/75 full rerun
Staging URL https://panda-atlas-web-staging.hao1012812011.workers.dev
Production URL https://www.zhipanda.com
Chinese and English Home, Atlas, profile, map, lineage, institution, place and My Pandas journeys covered

automated_accessibility.detail: The complete bilingual automated WCAG A/AA matrix passed against the final Staging and Production deployments.
evidence: Staging automated accessibility 40/40 PASS
Production automated accessibility 40/40 PASS
Windows Edge Playwright and axe-core execution
Desktop and mobile bilingual route coverage
Keyboard, text resize, reduced motion, structured map and structured lineage automated checks passed

human_signoff.detail: The product owner explicitly removed deployment-bound real-screen-reader records from the Public Beta release criteria on 2026-07-19. This waiver applies only to the product release decision and does not establish or imply WCAG 2.2 Level AA conformance.
evidence: Issue #61 owner review reported no blocking product issue
Product owner directed on 2026-07-19 that no real-screen-reader record is required for this Public Beta release
Automated accessibility passed 40/40 on both Staging and Production
The release profile explicitly records accessibility_conformance_claim.status as NOT_CLAIMED

release_decision.detail: Product Public Beta GO is approved for Production Worker 1d4d0f1f-356b-42d0-b205-82a1236257b1 and Public Release 2026.07.18.1. All deployment, contract, browser, automated accessibility and performance gates pass. No WCAG 2.2 Level AA conformance claim is made for this release.
